DATED MATERIAL, SUBJECT TO CHANGE. PLEASE CONSULT CURRENT UCSD GENERAL CATALOG FOR ANY ADDITIONAL INFORMATION.


Effective Fall 2022, major preparation will be required for this major. For details, visit: http://admissions.ucsd.edu/MajorPrep


Special Advising Note:

While not all lower division courses in this major are required for transfer major preparation, the Scripps Department encourages transfer students to complete as much of the major’s lower division coursework as possible prior to transferring to UC San Diego. Preparing well for the major helps students move efficiently toward graduation.


The UC San Diego Scripps Institution of Oceanography offers a Geosciences major leading to a B.S. degree, with emphasis on the quantitative aspects of the field. As a guiding concept, the focus of the Geosciences curriculum is the physical and chemical evolution of the earth system and the energetics and dynamics of this evolution.


For more information see the Scripps Undergraduate Education Web page at https://scripps.ucsd.edu/undergrad
